title: Selling Presets Without Stripe: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria, and you've tried selling presets online, but Stripe and PayPal won't let you collect payments. You're not alone. Many popular platforms exclude certain countries due to 'high risk' or ' restricted access' policies. As a result, you're left with no way to monetize your work. You've heard about cryptocurrency, but you don't know where to start. You're looking for an option that actually works for you, without relying on PayPal or other blocked payment processors. You're here because you need a solution that's reliable, secure, and designed specifically for creators like you.
What Each Option Actually Offers

When it comes to selling presets online, you have a few options: Gumroad, Sellfy, and other platforms that integrate with popular payment processors. However, these platforms often come with steep fees, and you may still face restrictions when trying to collect payments from certain countries. On the other hand, platforms like NOWPayments offer a cryptocurrency-based solution that eliminates the need for traditional payment processors. With NOWPayments, you can create a store and sell presets without relying on PayPal or Stripe. But what really sets NOWPayments apart is its integration with Web3 Wallet Connect, a frontend wallet solution that allows customers to purchase your presets with just a few clicks.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, traditional payment processors like PayPal and Stripe tend to be overly cautious. They may block your account or flag your transactions for review, causing you to lose valuable time and income. In contrast, NOWPayments has a more open approach. By using cryptocurrency, you can reach customers in restricted countries without worrying about account restrictions or delayed payments. With NOWPayments, you can sell presets to anyone, anywhere in the world, without facing the same limitations as traditional payment processors.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, traditional payment processors often fall short. They may charge high fees for international transactions, and payments can take days or even weeks to process. In contrast, NOWPayments offers fast and secure payments, with fees that are significantly lower than traditional payment processors. With NOWPayments, you can receive payments in a matter of minutes, giving you faster access to your income and allowing you to focus on creating more presets.
You don't need a PayPal or Stripe account to sell presets online; NOWPayments offers a cryptocurrency-based solution that eliminates the need for traditional payment processors.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

When it comes to automation and delivery capabilities, traditional payment processors often require manual intervention. You may need to manually deliver your presets to customers, which can lead to delays and lost sales. In contrast, NOWPayments offers automated delivery capabilities, allowing you to set up a store and sell presets with ease. With NOWPayments, you can automate the delivery of your presets, ensuring that customers receive their products quickly and efficiently.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which option is right for you? If you're looking for a reliable, secure, and cryptocurrency-based solution that eliminates the need for traditional payment processors, NOWPayments is the clear choice. With its integration with Web3 Wallet Connect, you can sell presets to anyone, anywhere in the world, without facing the same limitations as traditional payment processors. Whether you're just starting out or you're an established creator, NOWPayments offers a solution that's tailored to your needs.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
With NOWPayments, you can sell presets to anyone, anywhere in the world, without facing the same limitations as traditional payment processors.

Additionally, our Web3 Wallet Connect product offers a frontend wallet solution that allows customers to purchase your presets with just a few clicks. With these tools, you can take your preset sales to the next level and reach customers in restricted countries without worrying about account restrictions or delayed payments.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with selling presets on NOWPayments, follow these concrete action steps: (1) Create a NOWPayments account and set up your store. (2) Integrate Web3 Wallet Connect with your store to allow customers to purchase your presets with just a few clicks. (3) Set up automated delivery capabilities to ensure that customers receive their products quickly and efficiently. (4) Promote your store and presets to attract new customers. (5) Monitor your sales and adjust your strategy as needed to optimize your earnings. By following these steps, you can take your preset sales to the next level and achieve success in the digital marketplace.
NOWPayments offers fast, secure, and automated payment processing, allowing you to receive payments in a matter of minutes and focus on creating more presets.
